response.justification: While Bogdan has 20 years of software development experience and strong communication skills, he lacks two critical mandatory requirements: substantive C++ development on Windows platform (only ~6 months shown from 2014-2015 plus older thesis work) and any domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking. His professional trajectory over the past decade has been full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js, React), positioning him for a fundamentally different role than a capital markets C++ developer.
strengths: Strong communication abilities demonstrated through talks, workshops, and well-structured professional narrative
Extensive software development experience (20 years) across multiple domains showing adaptability and depth
Demonstrated SQL knowledge and experience with CI/CD infrastructure, DevOps practices, and Linux systems
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (only ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015) with no recent work; primary stack is TypeScript/JavaScript and DLang
No evidence of Windows platform development; nearly all professional experience is Linux-based, web, or open-source focused
Completely absent financial services, capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain knowledge or experience
